info.title: SlashMyBill FinOps Agent Actions
info.description: Action group for the SlashMyBill Bedrock Agent. Provides tools to query AWS account cost data, resource inventory, and optimization recommendations.

post.summary: Get AWS cost breakdown by service (30 days) and daily trend (7 days)
post.description: Retrieves cost by service for the last 30 days and daily cost trend for the last 7 days from AWS Cost Explorer.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: Member email for cross-account role assumption

200.description: Cost data with topServices array and dailyCosts array

post.summary: Compare costs across multiple months by service
post.description: Gets monthly cost breakdown by service for the last 3-6 months. Use this when the user asks to compare months or see trends.

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of months to compare (default: 3, max: 6)

post.summary: List EC2 instances with type, state, CPU utilization, and tags
post.description: Lists all EC2 instances with their instance type, state, availability zone, and 14-day average CPU utilization from CloudWatch.

post.summary: List RDS database instances with class, engine, CPU, and connections
post.description: Lists all RDS instances with their instance class, engine, storage, and 14-day average CPU and connection metrics.

post.summary: List Lambda functions with invocation counts, duration, and errors
post.description: Lists all Lambda functions with their runtime, memory, 30-day invocation count, average duration, and error count.

post.summary: List S3 buckets with lifecycle policy status
post.description: Lists all S3 buckets and whether they have lifecycle policies configured.

post.summary: List EBS volumes with type, size, attachment status, and IOPS
post.description: Lists all EBS volumes including unattached volumes (waste), gp2 volumes (migration candidates), and their sizes.

post.summary: List NAT Gateways, VPC Endpoints, and Elastic IPs
post.description: Lists NAT Gateways with data transfer metrics, VPC Endpoints with type and cost, and unassociated Elastic IPs.

post.summary: List AWS Budgets with current spend vs limit
post.description: Lists all configured AWS Budgets with their budget amount, actual spend, and forecasted spend.

post.summary: Get FinOps settings healthcheck status for an account
post.description: Returns the cached FinOps settings scan results including cost allocation tags, anomaly detection, budgets, and other best-practice checks.

post.summary: Search the cost optimization tips knowledge base
post.description: Queries the SlashMyBill knowledge base for cost optimization tips. Filter by service name.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: AWS service name filter (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, General)

post.summary: Get real-time AWS pricing for any service
post.description: Queries the AWS Pricing API for current on-demand, Reserved Instance, and Savings Plan pricing. Use for cost comparisons and commitment recommendations.

parameters.name: serviceCode
parameters.description: AWS service code: AmazonEC2, AmazonRDS, AmazonS3, AWSLambda, AmazonDynamoDB

post.summary: Get Spot Instance placement scores by region/AZ
post.description: Queries AWS Spot Placement Score API to assess Spot capacity availability. Returns scores 1-10 per region/AZ for the requested instance requirements. Use when the user asks about Spot availability or before recommending Spot migration.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: Member email for cross-account role assumption

200.description: Spot placement scores sorted by score descending with region/AZ breakdown
